title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Anthropic's Growth Team leveraged Claude Code to achieve rapid company growth from $1 billion to $19 billion valuation in 14 months. He identifies four core strategies: automating existing workflows, enabling sub-threshold work, building custom tools, and using AI as a thought partner, while highlighting a common ceiling where AI becomes added work instead of leverage.
